jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Hinduja Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
